title: More Craftable Items
description: With this mod, you can craft things that had no crafts!
body:
🛠️ More Craftable Items
Craft the impossible!

More Craftable Items is a quality-of-life mod that adds crafting recipes for rare, unobtainable, or semi-unobtainable items in vanilla Minecraft.
Tired of hunting for loot chests or fighting countless mobs just to get a saddle or a totem? Now you can craft them yourself — fairly and balanced!

Many crafts have been added such as:
- Elytra
- Bedrock
- Various ores
- Heads
- Diamond
- Iron, copper and gold ingot
- Totem
And much more!
The mod is available on Forge and NeoForge

 

For a cookie: https://www.donationalerts.com/r/muchprowmc
